name: Bird Simulator 24
short_description: Take flight in Bird Simulator 24, a chaotic bird game where you reclaim your territory from humans! Soar at supersonic speeds, unleash mayhem, and poop on targets from above. Scavenge food for power-ups, unlock skins, and explore hidden secrets. Become the ultimate bird overlord!
detailed_description:
Take flight in Bird Simulator 24, an outrageous action game where you reclaim your rightful territory from the humans and assert your genetic dominance! As a fearless bird, your mission is simple: rule the skies, reclaim your homeland, and fight the humans in the most hilarious ways imaginable.

Can you restore peace to the park?

Unravel the plot of the corrupt mayor scheming to demolish it, and fight to protect the greenery in all-new story mode missions.

Eat Anything You See!

Scavenge and devour everything that crosses your path! Every bite helps you rack up points and trigger special power-ups. The more you eat, the more chaos you can unleash!

Collect Skins and Hats!

Customization is key to showing off your birdly style! Collect and unlock dozens of unique skins and hats for your bird.

Unleash Birdly Vengeance on Humans!

Use anything in the environment to your advantage—trash cans, benches, cardboard boxes, and even ice cream stalls! Various edible items can come in handy providing a variety of combat effects, such as fireworks or donut immunity.

Poop with Precision!

The ultimate weapon in your arsenal: poop! Aim carefully as you dive-bomb targets from the sky. Time your shots perfectly to hit unsuspecting humans and cause maximum chaos. Precision pooping has never been more fun—or deadly.

Discover Hidden Secrets in a World Full of Surprises!

Explore a world filled with quirky secrets and hidden areas. Can you uncover all secrets? Only the most cunning and adventurous birds will find them all!

Are you ready to reclaim the skies and become the ultimate bird overlord?

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Polish*
*languages with full audio support
